name: Project Horizon - Q1 2024 Initiative
description: Executive dashboard for real-time project tracking and status visualization

milestones.name: Phase 1 Launch
milestones.description: Core infrastructure and authentication framework deployment

milestones.name: Phase 2 - Feature Set A
milestones.description: Dashboard UI and data visualization components

workItems.title: Dashboard API Endpoint
workItems.description: Implement RESTful API for dashboard data retrieval with caching layer for performance optimization

workItems.title: Work Item Timeline Component
workItems.description: Create responsive timeline visualization component for milestone tracking and status display

workItems.title: Data Export Functionality
workItems.description: Build screenshot and PDF export capabilities for executive presentation integration

workItems.title: Authentication & Authorization Module
workItems.description: Implement role-based access control system with multi-tenant support for enterprise deployment

workItems.title: Real-time Dashboard Updates
workItems.description: Develop WebSocket-based live update mechanism for dashboard data synchronization across connected clients

workItems.title: Performance Monitoring Dashboard
workItems.description: Build system metrics and performance monitoring interface for infrastructure health tracking

workItems.title: Legacy System Migration
workItems.description: Migrate data from legacy project management system with data validation and integrity checks

workItems.title: Mobile Responsive Redesign
workItems.description: Refactor dashboard components for tablet and mobile device compatibility and accessibility standards

workItems.title: Database Query Optimization
workItems.description: Review and optimize database queries to reduce dashboard load time below 500ms threshold
